articles.title: Six companies, six tricks in Indian balance sheets, and how investors get taken for a ride
articles.description: Whenever an Indian company imports goods, borrows in foreign currency, earns overseas revenue, or runs a foreign subsidiary, forex accounting enters the picture. But this is not just a currency note buried in the accounts. The rules decide whether exchange gains and losses hit profit and loss, sit in equity reserves, or make the numbers look cleaner than the business reality. This story explains why investors should not ignore the forex line, how judgement can change reported profit and net worth, and what they must check before trusting the headline numbers.

articles.title: Iran HITS BACK As US Super Hornets Strike Supertankers; IRGC Engages Navy Destroyers
articles.description: The "fragile ceasefire" in the Gulf has collapsed into open warfare. In a massive escalation, the U.S. military has begun launching airstrikes against supertankers attempting to bypass the naval blockade on Iran. CENTCOM confirms that over 70 vessels—capable of carrying 166 million barrels of oil—have been halted, with two VLCCs already disabled at sea. With the IRGC confirming direct naval combat against U.S. ships, the Strait of Hormuz is no longer a trade route; it is a front line.

articles.title: Twitch CEO Dan Clancy announces stricter action against viewbotting
articles.description: Twitch is implementing a new system to combat viewbotting, a practice where streamers artificially inflate viewer numbers. Starting in May, repeat offenders will face concurrent viewership caps based on their real traffic, with penalties escalating for persistent violations. The platform aims to create a fairer environment for legitimate creators by addressing fake engagement.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu CM announcement: Governor cannot question majority stitched post-poll

articles.title: Bokaro STPI project fails to take off despite land allotment in 2017

Despite securing land in 2017 for a sprawling 55,000-square-foot facility, construction is still at a standstill.

articles.title: Is Thailand-based ⁠OBON ⁠Corp really 'Company-1', and were Nvidia chips sent to Alibaba? US probe tracks alleged AI server smuggling route
articles.description: Is Thailand-based ⁠OBON ⁠Corp really 'Company-1', and were Nvidia chips sent to Alibaba? A new report says the US suspects AI servers with Nvidia chips were routed through Southeast Asia to China. Prosecutors claim billions of dollars in technology moved through intermediaries. Nvidia, Alibaba and Super Micro issued responses. The case links export controls, supply chains and AI infrastructure, raising questions about compliance and cross-border tech trade.

articles.title: “Wildly disrespectful relationship to his wife”: Mike Vrabel accused of publicly humiliating wife Jen as Dianna Russini scandal keeps exploding
articles.description: Mike Vrabel is facing intense backlash after fresh details in the Dianna Russini controversy resurfaced online. Critics questioned his leadership and accused him of disrespecting his wife and family after reports linked him to a years-long relationship with Russini. The outrage intensified following old boat rental records and viral photos involving the pair. Former NFL voices also fueled speculation about the true nature of their relationship, keeping the controversy at the center of NFL discussions.
